validation_velocity.validation_model: 10 custdev interviews + 3 partner-route calls + 2 pilot asks + route validation
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 2 qualified buyers accept a paid or structured pilot conversation and 1 credible partner or route owner agrees to proceed.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: No qualified buyer accepts a pilot conversation and no credible partner or route owner agrees to proceed.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: Protocol-derived from segment, approval-route complexity, buyer motion, and current validation/citation gaps.
validation_velocity.notes: validation queue severity 14; citation status ready; partner motion present; regulatory route present

pricing_or_offer_proof: Reference-market evidence includes strong non-branded commercial rankings, though public price normalization is still incomplete.
independent_operator_summary.social_funnel_signal: No Facebook-group-led funnel signal is captured yet in the validated evidence set.

segment_weighting.rationale: B2B product. Operator proof relevance: medium. Social funnel relevance: low. Confirmed independent operators increase the weight.

independent_operator_summary.takeaway: This is a real operator market with focused commercial players ranking on non-branded terms.
independent_operator_summary.why_not_stronger: The strongest proof is in reference markets and keyword traction, not yet in a full public price map.

market_evidence.next_research_step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks
market_evidence.notes: Current SEMrush evidence matches the expected scope for this product (reference). Evidence database: US. Captured 5/5 anchor families with total local query volume 80 and max anchor volume 50. Lane rollup contains 31 deduplicated keywords, including 13 P1 terms. Current watchlist domains: academyocean.com, eleapsoftware.com, elearningindustry.com, folio3.com, oasis-lms.com. Top follow-up keywords: white label elearning platform (P2, vol 70), white label elearning courses (P2, vol 20), elearning platform white label (P2, vol 0), white label kids elearning (P2, vol 0), white label training content courses (P2, vol 20). Reference analog domains: academyocean.com (US: white label lms, white label learning management system, white label lms platform, white label online course platform); talentlms.com (US); oasis-lms.com (US: white label lms, white label lms platform, white label online courses, white label e learning platform). Operator evidence is weighted for B2B: score 4/5 with adjustment 0.18. Next step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks.
